description: Resource schema for AWS::StepFunctions::MapRun. A Map Run is a set of child workflow executions started by a Distributed Map state in Step Functions.

MapRunArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the Map Run.

ExecutionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the execution in which the Map Run was started.

Status.description: The current status of the Map Run.

StartDate.description: The date when the Map Run was started.

StopDate.description: The date when the Map Run was stopped.

MaxConcurrency.description: The maximum number of child workflow executions configured to run in parallel for the Map Run at the same time.

ToleratedFailurePercentage.description: The maximum percentage of failed child workflow executions before the Map Run fails.

ToleratedFailureCount.description: The maximum number of failed child workflow executions before the Map Run fails.

MapRunItemCounts.description: Contains details about items processed in all child workflow executions started by a Map Run.

Pending.description: The total number of items to process in child workflow executions that haven't started running yet.

Running.description: The total number of items being processed in child workflow executions that are currently in-progress.

Succeeded.description: The total number of items processed in child workflow executions that have completed successfully.

Failed.description: The total number of items processed in child workflow executions that have failed.

TimedOut.description: The total number of items processed in child workflow executions that have timed out.

Aborted.description: The total number of items processed in child workflow executions that were stopped.

Total.description: The total number of items processed in all the child workflow executions started by a Map Run.

ResultsWritten.description: The count of items whose results were written by ResultWriter.

FailuresNotRedrivable.description: The number of items in child workflow executions that cannot be redriven.

PendingRedrive.description: The number of unsuccessful items currently waiting to be redriven.

MapRunExecutionCounts.description: Contains details about all child workflow executions started by a Map Run.

Pending.description: The total number of child workflow executions that haven't started executing yet.

Running.description: The total number of child workflow executions that are currently in-progress.

Succeeded.description: The total number of child workflow executions that have completed successfully.

Failed.description: The total number of child workflow executions that have failed.

TimedOut.description: The total number of child workflow executions that have timed out.

Aborted.description: The total number of child workflow executions that were stopped.

Total.description: The total number of child workflow executions started by a Map Run.

ResultsWritten.description: The count of child workflow executions whose results were written by ResultWriter.

FailuresNotRedrivable.description: The number of child workflow executions that cannot be redriven.

PendingRedrive.description: The number of unsuccessful child workflow executions waiting to be redriven.

ExecutionArn.description: The ARN of the execution for which Map Runs must be listed.
